apis.name: parametricConversion_ToNat_any
apis.type: List Char → Nat → List (Char × Nat) → Nat
apis.nl_description: Convert a digit string to a natural number using a base and digit table.

apis.name: parametricEscaping_Escape
apis.type: List Char → List Char → Char → List Char
apis.nl_description: Escape selected characters by prefixing an escape character.

apis.name: parametricEscaping_Unescape
apis.type: List Char → Char → Except UnescapeError (List Char)
apis.nl_description: Undo escaping and report an escape-at-end error.

apis.name: join
apis.nl_description: Join strings with a separator.

apis.name: concat
apis.nl_description: Concatenate strings with no separator.

apis.name: view__CopyTo
apis.type: View_ → List UInt8 → UInt32 → List UInt8
apis.nl_description: Copy a byte view into a destination buffer at an offset.

specs.name: spec_view_copy_to_region
specs.nl_description: CopyTo writes the view bytes into the requested destination slice.

specs.name: spec_view_copy_to_suffix_preserved
specs.nl_description: CopyTo preserves the destination suffix after the copied view range.

apis.name: chain_CopyTo
apis.type: Chain → List UInt8 → UInt32 → List UInt8
apis.nl_description: Copy a chain of views into a destination buffer ending at an offset.

apis.name: writer__Append
apis.nl_description: Append a byte view to a writer with saturated byte counting.

apis.name: writer__CopyTo
apis.nl_description: Copy writer bytes into the front of a destination buffer.

apis.name: writer__ToArray
apis.nl_description: Materialize a writer into a fresh byte list.

apis.name: stringBody
apis.nl_description: Run one step of the JSON string-body lexer.

apis.name: lexString
apis.nl_description: Run one step of the JSON string lexer.

specs.name: spec_lex_string_start_non_quote_rejects
specs.nl_description: lex string start non quote rejects

specs.name: spec_lex_string_body_unescaped_quote_ends
specs.nl_description: lex string body unescaped quote ends

specs.name: spec_lex_string_body_escaped_quote_continues
specs.nl_description: lex string body escaped quote continues

apis.name: vector_Put
apis.type: ∀ {α : Type}, JVector α → UInt32 → α → JVector α
apis.nl_description: Update a vector element at a UInt32 index.

apis.name: vector_Realloc
apis.type: ∀ {α : Type}, JVector α → UInt32 → Except VectorError (JVector α)
apis.nl_description: Reallocate a vector to the requested capacity.

apis.name: vector_PopFast
apis.nl_description: Remove the last vector element without reallocating.

apis.name: vector_PushFast
apis.type: ∀ {α : Type}, JVector α → α → JVector α
apis.nl_description: Append a vector element without reallocating.

apis.name: vector_ReallocDefault
apis.type: ∀ {α : Type}, JVector α → Except VectorError (JVector α)
apis.nl_description: Grow a vector using the default growth policy.

apis.name: vector_Ensure
apis.type: ∀ {α : Type}, JVector α → UInt32 → Except VectorError (JVector α)
apis.nl_description: Ensure that a vector has enough spare capacity.

apis.name: vector_Push
apis.type: ∀ {α : Type}, JVector α → α → Except VectorError (JVector α)
apis.nl_description: Append a vector element, growing if necessary.

specs.name: spec_vector_realloc_ok_updates_capacity
specs.nl_description: Under the Dafny Realloc precondition new_capacity > capacity, vector_Realloc succeeds and updates capacity.

specs.name: spec_vector_realloc_default_oom_iff_max
specs.nl_description: vector realloc default oom iff max

apis.name: intToBytes
apis.nl_description: Render an integer as ASCII decimal bytes.

apis.name: serializer_bool
apis.nl_description: Serialize a JSON boolean to its UTF-8 byte representation.

apis.name: serializer_string
apis.nl_description: Serialize a JSON string with quote delimiters and JSON escapes.

apis.name: serializer_int
apis.nl_description: Serialize an integer to ASCII decimal bytes.

apis.name: serializer_number
apis.nl_description: Serialize a decimal JSON number to bytes.

apis.name: serializer_object
apis.nl_description: Serialize a JSON object from ordered key-value pairs.

apis.name: serializer_array
apis.nl_description: Serialize a JSON array from its elements.

apis.name: serializer_value
apis.nl_description: Serialize any high-level JSON value to bytes.

apis.name: serializer_keyValue
apis.nl_description: Serialize a JSON object key-value pair.

apis.name: serializer_json
apis.nl_description: Serialize a complete high-level JSON value.

specs.name: spec_serializer_string_quotes
specs.nl_description: Successful string serialization wraps exactly the JSON-escaped UTF-8 payload.

specs.name: spec_serializer_string_too_long
specs.nl_description: If the escaped UTF-8 payload for a string is too long, serializer_string reports stringTooLong.

specs.name: spec_serializer_keyValue_composes_string_colon_value
specs.nl_description: KeyValue serialization composes the serialized key, colon byte, and serialized value.

apis.name: zcApiSerializeAlloc
apis.nl_description: Serialize a concrete-syntax JSON tree into a fresh byte array.

specs.name: spec_zcApiSerializeAlloc_always_ok
semantic_bridge_required: jSON__Valid? precondition restores erased Grammar.JSON refinement types
specs.nl_description: Zero-copy allocation succeeds on valid concrete-syntax JSON trees and returns their exact concrete-syntax bytes when the serialized bytes fit in the writer length counter.

specs.name: spec_zcApiSerializeAlloc_rejects_invalid_grammar
semantic_bridge_required: jSON__Valid? precondition restores erased Grammar.JSON refinement types
specs.nl_description: Zero-copy allocation rejects concrete-syntax JSON trees whose erased Lean grammar tokens fail validity.

apis.name: apiSerializeAlloc
apis.nl_description: Serialize a high-level JSON value into a freshly allocated byte array.
